content.text:
<user_query>
# Master Prompt for Designing a Professional Portfolio Website

for Kamuzu University of Health Sciences Medical Student
**El-shaddai Mpaso — MBBS Student | Health Tech | AI in Healthcare | Clinical Research | Tech Entrepreneur**

---

## PROJECT OVERVIEW

Design and develop a modern, professional, responsive portfolio website for **El-shaddai Mpaso**, a first-year MBBS student at Kamuzu University of Health Sciences in Malawi.

The website should position him as:

* A future physician interested in AI and digital health
* An aspiring clinical researcher
* A technology entrepreneur and problem solver
* A student building a professional academic and industry presence early

The overall aesthetic should communicate:

* Intelligence
* Innovation
* Professionalism
* Trust
* Modern healthcare technology
* Global career readiness

The website should feel comparable to portfolios used by:

* Medical researchers
* Health-tech founders
* AI healthcare innovators
* Academic professionals
* Young professionals in STEM

---

# DESIGN DIRECTION

## Visual Style

Use a clean, elegant, futuristic design inspired by:

* Modern medical technology
* Minimalist research dashboards
* Healthcare innovation websites
* Academic personal branding

### Preferred Color Palette

Primary:

* Deep navy blue
* White
* Soft gray

Accent colors:

* Cyan / electric blue
* Emerald green
* Light gradient glow effects

### Typography

Use modern professional fonts:

* Headings: Inter / Poppins / Sora
* Body: Inter / Open Sans

### Design Features

* Smooth animations
* Soft shadows
* Rounded cards
* Subtle hover effects
* Modern UI components
* Glassmorphism or light neumorphism accents
* Mobile-first responsive layout
* Fast loading speed

---

# WEBSITE STRUCTURE

## 1. HERO SECTION

### Purpose

Immediately establish identity and professional positioning.

### Include

* Professional portrait/photo placeholder
* Full name:
  **El-shaddai Mpaso**
* Title:
  “MBBS Student | Health Tech Enthusiast | AI in Healthcare”
* Short professional statement:
  “Passionate about the future of medicine through artificial intelligence, clinical research, and healthcare innovation.”
* CTA buttons:

  * View Projects
  * Contact Me
  * Download CV

### Background

Use:

* Animated gradient
* Subtle healthcare-tech patterns
* Medical + digital themed visuals

---

## 2. ABOUT SECTION

### Goal

Tell a compelling professional story.

### Content Themes

* First-year MBBS student at KUHeS
* Interest in AI applications in healthcare
* Interest in digital medicine and innovation
* Interest in clinical research
* Entrepreneurial background in tech support
* Passion for solving problems using technology

### Tone

Professional, ambitious, intelligent, forward-looking.

### Add

* Timeline or journey visualization
* Professional statistics cards:

  * MBBS Student
  * Tech Entrepreneur
  * AI Enthusiast
  * Research Interest Areas

---

## 3. SKILLS SECTION

### Categories

#### Medical & Academic

* Anatomy
* Physiology
* Medical Research Fundamentals
* Scientific Writing

#### Technology

* Laptop Repair
* Software Installation
* Troubleshooting
* IT Support
* Digital Productivity

#### Future-Focused Skills

* AI in Healthcare
* Health Informatics
* Clinical Data Analysis
* Research Methodology

### Visuals

Use:

* Progress bars
* Animated skill cards
* Icons

---

## 4. PROJECTS SECTION

### Goal

Show initiative and growth potential.

### Include Placeholder/Future Projects Such As:

* AI in Healthcare Research Concepts
* Health-Tech Startup Ideas
* Clinical Research Interests
* Technology Repair Business
* Digital Solutions for Students

### Each Project Card Should Have

* Title
* Description
* Technologies/tools used
* Tags
* GitHub/demo placeholder buttons

---

## 5. RESEARCH & INTERESTS SECTION

### Focus Areas

* Artificial Intelligence in Medicine
* Clinical Research
* Public Health Technology
* Medical Data Science
* Digital Diagnostics
* Healthcare Innovation in Africa

### Add

* Research goals
* Future aspirations
* Academic interests

### Visual Style

Modern cards with icons and subtle animations.

---

## 6. BUSINESS SECTION

### Title

“Tech Services & Digital Solutions”

### Describe

The user’s technology business:

* Software installation
* Laptop troubleshooting
* Device optimization
* Tech support
* Digital assistance

### Include

* Service cards
* Contact button
* Business professionalism section

### Goal

Present entrepreneurial experience professionally.

---

## 7. EXPERIENCE & EDUCATION

### Education

* MBBS — Kamuzu University of Health Sciences
* Year 1 Medical Student
* Malawi

### Experience

* Founder/Operator of personal tech service business
* Freelance tech support experience

### Layout

Modern vertical timeline.

---

## 8. CERTIFICATIONS & LEARNING

### Include Placeholder Sections For:

* AI courses
* Research methodology certifications
* Technology certifications
* Medical workshops
* Future achievements

### Add

“Currently learning…” section.

---

## 9. BLOG / INSIGHTS SECTION

### Purpose

Support LinkedIn growth and thought leadership.

### Future Topics

* AI in African healthcare
* Medical student productivity
* Clinical research insights
* Technology and medicine
* Student entrepreneurship

### Design

Modern article cards.

---

## 10. CONTACT SECTION

### Include

* Professional email
* LinkedIn
* GitHub
* WhatsApp
* Contact form

### Design

Minimal and elegant.

---

# TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

## Frontend

Use:

* React + Next.js
* Tailwind CSS
* Framer Motion

## Additional Libraries

* Lucide Icons
* Shadcn UI
* GSAP (optional)

## Website Features

* Fully responsive
* Dark/light mode
* Smooth scrolling
* SEO optimized
* Fast performance
* Accessibility support

---

# SEO & PERSONAL BRANDING

Optimize for:

* Medical student portfolio
* AI in healthcare
* Malawi medical student
* Clinical research student
* Health tech innovator
* African health technology

### Include Metadata

* Professional title
* Open Graph support
* LinkedIn preview optimization

---

# CONTENT TONE

The website tone should communicate:

* Intelligence
* Ambition
* Professional maturity
* Curiosity
* Innovation
* Leadership potential

Avoid:

* Overly casual language
* Excessive animations
* Cluttered design
* Generic student templates

---

# SPECIAL BRANDING POSITIONING

This website should position El-shaddai as:

> “A future physician building at the intersection of medicine, artificial intelligence, clinical research, and healthcare innovation in Africa.”

The portfolio should feel globally competitive while authentically representing a medical student from Malawi building toward a future in health-tech and research leadership.

---

# FUTURE EXPANSION FEATURES

Prepare the architecture for:

* Research publications
* Blog CMS
* Appointment booking
* Case studies
* Startup portfolio
* Newsletter
* Resume generator
* AI healthcare projects showcase

---

# FINAL OUTPUT EXPECTATIONS

The final website should:

* Look premium and professional
* Be suitable for internships and scholarships
* Support networking and LinkedIn growth
* Attract collaborators and mentors
* Present strong early-career branding
* Be deployable to:

  * [Vercel](https://vercel.com?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
  * [Netlify](https://www.netlify.com?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
  * [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
</user_query>

{
  "name": "el-shaddai-mpaso-portfolio",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "framer-motion": "^11.15.0",
    "lucide-react": "^0.468.0",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "tailwind-merge": "^2.6.0",
    "class-variance-authority": "^0.7.1",
    "@radix-ui/react-slot": "^1.1.1",
    "next-themes": "^0.4.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^22.10.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.16",
    "postcss": "^8.4.49",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20",
    "eslint": "^9.16.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^15.1.0"
  }
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": { "@/*": ["./src/*"] }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

# dependencies
/node_modules
/.pnp
.pnp.*
.yarn/*
!.yarn/patches
!.yarn/plugins
!.yarn/releases
!.yarn/versions

# testing
/coverage

# next.js
/.next/
/out/

# production
/build

# misc

*.pem

# debug
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*
.pnpm-debug.log*

# env files
.env*.local

# vercel
.vercel

# typescript
*.tsbuildinfo

# El-shaddai Mpaso — Portfolio

Professional portfolio website for an MBBS student at Kamuzu University of Health Sciences, positioned at the intersection of medicine, AI, clinical research, and healthcare innovation.

## Tech Stack

- **Next.js 15** (App Router)
- **React 19**
- **Tailwind CSS**
- **Framer Motion**
- **Lucide Icons**
- **next-themes** (dark/light mode)

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000).

## Customize

1. Update contact links and email in `src/lib/data.ts`
2. Replace the hero portrait placeholder with your photo in `src/components/sections/hero.tsx`
3. Add your CV PDF to `public/cv.pdf`
4. Update `siteConfig.url` for production SEO

## Deploy

Deploy to [Vercel](https://vercel.com), [Netlify](https://netlify.com), or [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com):

```bash
npm run build
```

### Vercel

```bash
npx vercel
```

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── app/           # Layout, page, global styles
├── components/    # UI, navbar, footer, sections
└── lib/           # Data & utilities
```

Built for future expansion: blog CMS, publications, booking, and project showcases.

content.text:
Your professional portfolio site is built in your workspace. Here is what is ready and how to use it.

## What’s built

A **Next.js 15** portfolio with **Tailwind CSS**, **Framer Motion**, **Lucide icons**, and **dark/light mode** (`next-themes`), styled with navy, cyan, and emerald accents.

### All 10 sections (per your brief)

| Section | Features |
|---------|----------|
| **Hero** | Animated gradient background, portrait placeholder (EM initials), CTAs (Projects, Contact, Download CV) |
| **About** | Professional story, stat cards, journey timeline |
| **Skills** | 3 categories with animated progress bars |
| **Projects** | 5 project cards with tags and GitHub/Demo links |
| **Research** | 6 focus areas + research goals |
| **Business** | Tech services cards + contact CTA |
| **Experience** | Education + work vertical timeline |
| **Certifications** | Certs + “Currently learning” list |
| **Blog** | Article cards (Coming Soon) |
| **Contact** | Social links + contact form |

### Also included

- Sticky navbar with mobile menu  
- SEO metadata + Open Graph tags  
- Responsive, mobile-first layout  
- Content centralized in `src/lib/data.ts` for easy edits  

## Project location

```
C:\Users\El-shaddai Mpaso\.cursor\projects\empty-window
```

## Run locally

In a terminal:

```bash
cd "C:\Users\El-shaddai Mpaso\.cursor\projects\empty-window"
npm install
npm run dev
```

Then open **http://localhost:3000**.

## Deploy (Vercel recommended)

```bash
npm run build
npx vercel
```

Also works on **Netlify** and **GitHub Pages**.

## Customize before going live

1. **`src/lib/data.ts`** — email, LinkedIn, GitHub, WhatsApp, site URL  
2. **`src/components/sections/hero.tsx`** — replace the EM placeholder with your photo  
3. **`public/cv.pdf`** — add your real CV for the Download CV button  
4. **Project links** — replace `#` GitHub/demo URLs with real repos  

## Design positioning

The site presents you as:

> *A future physician building at the intersection of medicine, artificial intelligence, clinical research, and healthcare innovation in Africa.*

If you want, I can next help with: adding your real photo/CV, wiring the contact form to email (e.g. Resend/Formspree), or deploying to Vercel.

[REDACTED]
